hero.sub: Deploy Llama 3, Mistral, Qwen, and 50+ models with a single API call. OpenAI-compatible. Zero GPU ops.
hero.free_note: No credit card required · Free up to 1M tokens/month

features.title: Infrastructure built for serious LLM workloads
features.sub: From first deploy to enterprise scale — Cloudach handles GPUs, networking, and scaling so your team ships faster.
features.f1_desc: Point to any HuggingFace repo or upload your weights. We containerize, provision, and serve automatically.
features.f2_desc: Scale from zero to thousands of RPS in seconds. Pay only for tokens processed — no idle GPU billing.
features.f3_desc: Swap your base URL and go. Same SDK, same interface — your open-source model, your infrastructure.
features.f4_desc: Your model, your network. No shared compute. Enterprise deployments support full air-gap mode.
features.f5_desc: vLLM continuous batching, flash attention, and tensor parallelism — tuned for low latency at high load.
features.f6_desc: Run LoRA and QLoRA fine-tunes on your data directly on the platform. No external training infra needed.

models.sub: Deploy from our curated open-source library or bring your own fine-tuned weights. GGUF, safetensors, and HuggingFace all supported.

pricing.how_title: Model to API in three steps
pricing.step1_desc: Choose from 40+ curated open-source models or paste any HuggingFace URL. GGUF, safetensors, and direct upload all supported.
pricing.step2_desc: Select GPU tier, region, and autoscaling policy. See your estimated cost per million tokens before committing — no surprises.
pricing.step3_desc: Receive an OpenAI-compatible REST URL. Swap your base URL and go — same SDK, same interface, your model.
pricing.sub: Start free, scale with confidence. Every plan runs on the same infrastructure — you only pay for what you use.
pricing.trust_note: No contracts. Cancel anytime. Prices in USD.
pricing.plan_pro_desc: For production apps and growing teams.
pricing.plan_enterprise_desc: For regulated industries and large-scale teams.

footer.tagline: LLM cloud infrastructure for developers and enterprises.

home.t1_quote: We swapped from a managed API to Cloudach in an afternoon. Same interface, 60% cheaper per token, and we finally own our inference stack.
home.t2_quote: The deploy-in-60-seconds claim is real. I had Llama 3 70B serving production traffic before my coffee finished brewing.
home.t3_quote: Autoscaling and vLLM batching out of the box — it would've taken our infra team weeks to build this ourselves. Cloudach just works.
home.cta_sub:
Join 5,000+ developers and teams running open-source LLMs on Cloudach.
Free to start. No credit card required.
